hero.h1: Honor Their Memory with a Personalized Pet Keepsake
hero.subtitle: Create a meaningful memorial gift for a beloved dog, cat, or companion. Personalized with photos, names, dates, and optional NFC digital memorial pages.

image.alt: personalized pet memorial frame with candle and flowers in warm natural light

categories.title: Shop by Category
categories.subtitle: Find the perfect memorial gift for your beloved companion.

nfc.title: A Memorial Card That Opens Their Story
nfc.description: Our NFC pet memorial cards allow families to keep photos, videos, stories, and loving messages in one digital memorial page. Simply tap the card with a smartphone to open the memory page.

image.alt: NFC pet memorial card opening a digital memory page on smartphone

keyPoints: Perfect beside an urn, photo frame, or keepsake box

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Creating a personalized memorial gift is simple and thoughtful.

howItWorksSteps.title: Choose Your Keepsake
howItWorksSteps.description: Browse our collection of personalized memorial gifts and select the perfect tribute.

howItWorksSteps.title: Upload Pet Photo & Details
howItWorksSteps.description: Add your pet's name, photo, dates, and a personal message during checkout.

howItWorksSteps.title: Preview and Confirm Design
howItWorksSteps.description: We send a design proof for your review before anything goes into production.

howItWorksSteps.title: Receive Your Memorial Gift
howItWorksSteps.description: Your personalized keepsake arrives beautifully packaged and ready to display.

howItWorksSteps.title: Open the Digital Memorial Page
howItWorksSteps.description: For NFC products, tap the tag or scan the QR code to access the online memorial page.

personalizationOptions.label: NFC Digital Page
personalizationOptions.description: Tap to open a digital memorial
